positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical illustration of bioluminescent cosmic flora and fauna. Feature a central, intricate mandalic composition dominated by stylized celestial vines, glowing nebulae patterns, and abstract stylized geometric elements. Use a dark midnight blue and deep indigo background contrasted sharply with vibrant electric teal, glowing gold, and magenta accents. The style should be a fusion of Art Nouveau elegance and modern psychedelic vaporwave graphic design. The silhouettes must be clean and bold, emphasizing depth and contrast suitable for a screen print on dark fabric. Minimalist yet richly detailed.
